start.title: Soft Ringing
start.text: A faint chiming drifts through the cold air. Hanging from a dead tree are small metal chimes turning slowly in the wind.

inspect.title: Names Etched in Metal
inspect.text: Each chime has a name scratched into it. Some are so worn they can barely be read anymore.

leave.title: Fading Sound
leave.text: The chiming slowly disappears behind you as the snowstorm swallows the tree from sight.
